Home / Services / Carpet Installation & Replacement

Carpet Installation & Replacement

Comfort, warmth, and style with our professional carpet services.

Carpet provides warmth, comfort, and sound insulation, making it a popular choice for bedrooms, living rooms, and family rooms in Long Beach homes. We offer a wide selection of carpet styles, colors, and textures to suit any décor. We understand the importance of choosing the right carpet for your lifestyle and budget.

Our installation process includes removing existing flooring, preparing the subfloor, installing padding, and stretching and securing the carpet. We use professional-grade tools and techniques to ensure a smooth and wrinkle-free installation. We also offer carpet repair services, addressing issues such as stains, tears, and loose seams. Regular cleaning and maintenance can extend the life of your carpet.

Given the warm climate in Long Beach, stain-resistant carpets are a great choice. We can help you select a carpet that is both comfortable and durable. From plush textures to Berber styles, we have the expertise to handle any carpet installation project.

Our Process

  1. 01 Old Carpet Removal
  2. 02 Subfloor Preparation
  3. 03 Padding Installation
  4. 04 Carpet Stretching & Securing

Benefits

  • Comfort & Warmth
  • Sound Insulation
  • Variety of Styles
  • Affordable Price

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of carpet is best for high-traffic areas?

For high-traffic areas, we recommend a low-pile carpet made from durable fibers such as nylon or polyester. These carpets are resistant to crushing and staining.

How often should I clean my carpets?

We recommend professional carpet cleaning every 12-18 months to remove dirt, allergens, and stains. Regular vacuuming can also help extend the life of your carpet.

What is the best way to remove stains from carpet?

Act quickly and blot the stain with a clean cloth. Avoid rubbing the stain, as this can spread it. Use a carpet stain remover specifically designed for the type of stain.
